description_long: This object is a group of four sports balls placed on a flat, dark rectangular surface. The group includes a large orange basketball with black channel lines, a black-and-white paneled soccer ball, a bright green tennis ball with a white curved seam, and a white baseball with red stitching. The basketball and soccer ball are the largest, positioned side by side, while the tennis ball and baseball are smaller and placed in front of them. Each ball features distinct surface patterns and colors characteristic of its sport. The overall appearance is clean and new, with no visible branding or wear.
description: A set of four sports balls—basketball, soccer ball, tennis ball, and baseball—arranged on a flat surface, each with distinct colors and markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basketball and soccer ball behind the tennis ball and baseball, with the basketball most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view with the basketball and soccer ball side by side, both fully visible and dominating the scene.
description_view_2: Rear view with the soccer ball in front, partially obscuring the basketball, and the tennis ball and baseball behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with all four balls clearly visible, the soccer ball and basketball in the back, tennis ball and baseball in front.
attribute_sport-specific_markings: Basketball has black channel lines; soccer ball has black and white pentagonal and hexagonal panels; tennis ball has a white curved seam; baseball has red stitching. All markings are standard for their respective sports and are located on the surface of each ball.
